repository.name: move-anything-waveform-editor
repository.description: Waveform Editor tool for Move Everything - trim, gain adjust, normalize, and edit WAV files on the Ableton Move

commit.message:
Refactor DSP to stereo, fix drum preset export, and misc improvements

- Refactor DSP from mono int16 to interleaved stereo int16 (L,R,L,R,...)
- Mono WAV files duplicated to both channels on load
- Support PCM 16-bit, PCM 24-bit, and IEEE float 32-bit input
- WAV output always stereo 16-bit PCM
- Waveform display and zero-crossing use L channel
- Fix DSP export symbol: plugin_init -> move_plugin_init_v2
- Fix build.sh to copy from src/dsp/dsp.so (Docker output path)
- Fix drum preset sampleUri: URL-encode spaces (%20)
- Default auto slice threshold from 5 to 25
- Disable loop playback in slice mode, restore on exit
- Back from record-ready state exits module entirely

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: move-anything-waveform-editor
repository.description: Waveform Editor tool for Move Everything - trim, gain adjust, normalize, and edit WAV files on the Ableton Move

commit.message:
Fix recording race condition and improve recorded file handling

- Add "stopping" state to poll sampler finalization before loading WAV,
  preventing "No waveform data" error from async stop
- Show "SAVING..." screen while waiting for WAV to finalize
- Track recorded files as unsaved (dirty) with discard-on-exit cleanup
- Add timestamp to edit filenames (sample_edit_0306_1423.wav)
- Clean up recording UI header (remove debug VU display)
- Add dirty param support to DSP plugin

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Remap knobs: E4=vertical scale, E5=gain/threshold, E7/E8=twist actions

- E3: zoom only (removed shift+E3 vertical scale)
- E4: vertical scale for all modes (was shift+E3)
- E5: gain/normalize in trim/loop, threshold in slice auto (was E4)
- E7 touch+twist: toggle loop on/off
- E8 touch+twist: snap to zero crossing
- Twist prompts stay visible while knob is touched
- Add snapToZeroCrossing() helper function
- Recording waveform: scrolling write-head visualization
- Recording stop: poll for sampler finalization before loading
- Shift+pad preview: 5% of selection, clamped 0.25s-5s
- Update help.json for new knob layout

New features:

Replace line selector with continuous tap/drag bar

Server:
- line category marked continuous:true, no longer uses discrete vote counters
- linePositions Map per sheet stores float 0-1 per voter
- new vote-line socket event and broadcastLineUpdate function
- endVoting computes line winner as average of all positions (float 0-1)
- publicSheet exposes lineAvg and lineCount
- join-sheet/disconnect clean up linePositions correctly
- start-round clears linePositions

Voter (phone):
- Line category replaced with a horizontal tap/drag bar (2' to 12')
- Drag or tap anywhere; gold dot marker follows finger
- Other voters' positions shown as blue dots above the bar
- Average of all taps shown as semi-transparent vertical marker
- Pick summary shows result as feet+inches (e.g. "7' 4"")

Display (TV):
- Line vote bars replaced with a distribution bar visualization
- Blue dots at each voter position, gold average marker
- foot labels (2' through 12') along bar
- Result screen shows line as feet+inches via formatLineResult()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Check 3c now works for prohibition locks without regressions

- Extended Check 3c (working-WITH-technology) to prohibition locks
  ("must never", "don't", "do not") so "Update Stripe UI" doesn't
  false-positive against "Stripe API keys must never be exposed"
- Added actionPerformsProhibitedOp guard to prevent Check 3c from
  overriding when action verb IS a synonym of the prohibited verb
  (e.g., "update" ≈ "modify" against "don't modify Stripe integration")
- Hoisted actionPerformsProhibitedOp to function scope for use across
  all intent-alignment checks
- Capped intent-aligned scores at conflictThreshold-1 so aligned
  actions with high keyword overlap (e.g., "optimize" vs "must be
  optimized") never reach the threshold
- Fixed LLM merge (v4.5.4) to use MAX(heuristic, LLM) per lock

All tests: adversarial 61/61, phase4 91/91, john 86/86, sam 124/124,
real-world 105/111, G-suite all pass. v4.5.5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add OAuth2 client_credentials auth and base_url support to http_client provider (#458)

Add first-class OAuth2 authentication to the http_client provider, enabling
structured API integrations without manual token management. This replaces
the need for bash+curl workarounds when integrating with OAuth2-protected
APIs like MongoDB Atlas.

New capabilities:
- `auth.type: oauth2_client_credentials` config with automatic token
  fetch, caching (keyed by token_url+client_id), near-expiry refresh,
  and concurrent request deduplication
- `base_url` + `path` + `params` + `query` for building URLs from parts
  with {placeholder} substitution (e.g. /groups/{groupId}/clusters)
- `body` now accepts JSON objects in addition to Liquid template strings

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(cache): use adapter.rename for cache folder move

Replace readBinary/writeBinary/remove loop with adapter.rename() for
OS-level inode moves. Eliminates unnecessary RAM usage, improves
performance on large caches, and removes data-loss risk from interrupted
copies. Also auto-removes the old (now-empty) folder after move.

Preload LCP hero image on singular pages Add in for the hero image on articles, guides, product pages, and generic pages. This lets the browser start fetching the LCP image in parallel with render-blocking CSS instead of waiting to discover the tag in the body. Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6

feat(guidance): adaptive EMA remasking lock + Round 6 experiment

Per-sample adaptive lock: start with remasking ON, track EMA(reward)
with beta=0.85, permanently disable remasking when d(EMA) <= 0 for 3
consecutive steps or at hard deadline t=0.5.

Implementation:
- guided_sampler.py: 4 new params (ema_lock, ema_beta,
  ema_lock_consecutive, ema_lock_deadline), save/restore mechanism
  for locked samples, skip Option A model call when all locked
- generate_guided.py: --ema-lock, --ema-beta, --ema-lock-consecutive,
  --ema-lock-deadline CLI flags
- analyze_guidance_stats.py: EMA overlay on reward subplot, t_lock
  dashed vertical line on all trajectory subplots
- 4 new tests (smoke, deadline, diagnostics, noop)
- Round 6 experiment script (Option A + lock, Option B + lock)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(search): run pagefind CLI on Vercel output dir after astro build

The astro-pagefind integration may fail silently if the platform binary
is not available or if hook ordering differs on Vercel CI. Running
pagefind CLI explicitly on .vercel/output/static/ after astro build
guarantees the index is always present in the Vercel deployment.

fix(solution): fix DPS kernel signature for flashinfer-bench compatibility

- Change kernel function signature from 6 to 8 parameters (DPS style)
- Add output and lse as pre-allocated parameters instead of return values
- Fix Modal volume mount path configuration in run_modal.py
- Remove test.py as part of cleanup
- Update .gitignore to exclude Claude and tmp directories

This fixes COMPILE_ERROR on Modal B200 where flashinfer-bench expects
Destination-Passing Style callables with 8 parameters but received 6.

All 23 workloads now pass with 1.38x-2.52x speedup.

commit.message:
refactor(cpr): 히어로 섹션 개선 및 타사 콘텐츠 제거

**히어로 섹션 개선**
- 모바일 높이 조정: min-h-[100svh] → min-h-[70vh] (영상 크기에 맞춤)
- 자막 스타일 타이포그래피 애니메이션 적용:
  - 모든 텍스트에 검은 반투명 배경 박스 추가 (bg-black/80)
  - "실전 마케팅" 강조 텍스트는 파란 배경 (bg-blue-600/90)
  - 둥근 모서리 (rounded-lg, rounded-xl) 적용
  - backdrop-blur 효과로 고급스러움 추가
  - 애니메이션 지연 시간 조정 (300ms → 2000ms 순차 진행)

**타사 벤치마킹 콘텐츠 제거**
- 유입 변화 이미지 교체:
  /타사.../자립마케팅/유입율 변화 강조.png
  → /assets/cpr/사진/유입율 변화 1.jpg
- 작업 과정 영상 섹션을 이미지 갤러리로 변경:
  타사 영상 3개 (장가컴퍼니, 매듭컴퍼니)
  → CPR 자체 검색 광고 세팅 이미지 3개
- video 태그 → Image 컴포넌트 + Lightbox 클릭 기능 추가
- Video 아이콘 → CheckCircle 아이콘으로 변경

**기타 개선사항**
- 작업 화면 이미지에 hover 효과 및 줌 아이콘 추가
- 모든 이미지 lightbox 지원

fix: add TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY_PASSWORD env var for CI signing

read the password from TTY which fails in CI. Adding the password
env var from GitHub secrets so the signer can decrypt the key.

commit.message:
Fix pdf.js loading: inline bridge as ES module in index.html

The separate pdf_bridge.js file failed to load due to MIME type issues
when served by trunk. Inlining the bridge code as a <script type="module">
before trunk's WASM init ensures pdf.js loads via proper ES module import
and window.pdfBridge is set before WASM calls it.
